Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blackflame Empire]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — The Blackflame Empire is the empire where the Jai clan resides.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackflame Empire contains only a handful of Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackflame Empire is a civilization.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — The Blackflame Empire is a place where they do not have harvesters like the ones used by the miners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — The Blackflame Empire is located far to the east.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Eithan serves the Blackflame Empire as an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — The Blackflame Empire is a location where Jai Long's sister might move.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — The Blackflame Empire contains a remote range of mountains at its southern edge.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — There are not many who know Yerin's master in the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — The Blackflame Empire is the destination Lindon is returning to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — The Blackflame Empire contains different clans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — The mountains to the west of the Desolate Wilds are at the western edge of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackflame Empire is a location the characters are landing in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Blackflame Empire was founded by a family that found a source of dragon power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Blackflame Empire uses a ranking and categorization system for everything.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Blackflame Empire is a territory that the Emperor has been unable to hold in its full scope for two generations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Eithan is not entirely from the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — In the Blackflame Empire, a superior-grade scale is worth about ten thousand of Lindon's scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan's arrival had an impact in the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — A young Underlord had taken Lindon and Yerin back into the Blackflame Empire for training.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — The Blackflame Empire is a place where killing an Underlord is difficult.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — The Blackflame Empire is located at the southern edge of a lush green expanse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — The Blackflame Empire has met its demise.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is in the southern part of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — The Blackflame Empire is the empire where the duel takes place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — The original Blackflame Empire was destroyed by the last time Corrupted ones woke up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — The Skysworn's green armor is highly respected within the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackflame Empire is an empire ruled by an emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackflame Empire is led by Naru Huan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackflame Empire can employ a strategy of fleeing like mice in front of overwhelming natural disasters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — The Blackflame Empire is a territory owned by the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — No one in the Blackflame Empire possesses the space-control abilities of the Akura family Matriarch or her disciples.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — The Blackflame Empire is an empire where Skysworn serve as heroes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — The Blackflame Empire's strength is perceived to increase if an Akura works for it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackflame Empire is mentioned in relation to the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackflame Empire is a political entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackflame Empire has a healer who can restore hooks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Without the Beast King and other guardians, the Blackflame Empire would be a war-torn desert.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — The Blackflame Empire contains a western labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — The dragons came from the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — The Blackflame Empire has a delegation near the Life Well.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — The Blackflame Empire was fractured and lawless following the fall of the Jai clan and before the rise of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — The Blackflame Empire is a location where competition between Monarch disciples may spill over.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan spoke of growing together for the good of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — The Blackflame Empire is gathering for a selection process.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Underlords are rare in the Blackflame Empire because the aura is thin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — The army streaming from the portal bears symbols of different Blackflame Empire factions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — The Blackflame Empire camp is located behind Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackflame Empire defends the territory within the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The aura in the current location is a hundred times stronger than in the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Seishen Kingdom might be attacking the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackflame Empire uses Skysworn as scouts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Underlords in the Blackflame Empire are treated like kings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — The Blackflame Empire is one of the factions Mercy mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — The Blackflame Empire's crest is stamped on the scales Eithan used for Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin intends to attempt her advancement in the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — The aura in the Blackflame Empire felt weaker after staying in Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — The Blackflame Empire is retreating.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — The portal to the Blackflame Empire is a tall column of darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Mercy is prohibited from returning to the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Akura Charity promised to add a gift to the Blackflame Empire in compensation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Charity addresses the people of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Charity did not select Lindon as one of the three competitors from the Blackflame Empire.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 1''' — The Blackflame Empire is the empire from which Orthos's dragon ancestors descend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — The Blackflame Empire competitors have already been chosen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The major families want the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The Blackflame Empire doubled its number of Underlords during the competition in the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — The Akura clan's power dwarfs the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — The fate of the Blackflame Empire is tied to the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackflame Empire is a vassal team in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackflame Empire is closer to the dragons and weaker than the Frozen Blade school.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackflame Empire team is en route.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackflame Empire is a group that Lindon wants to keep out of dragon hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The culture that named the Ninecloud country is the same as the one that named the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Blackflame Empire is a vassal team of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Naru Saeya wants the name of the Blackflame Empire to spread.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — A fighter from the Blackflame Empire is matched against the last descendant of their original royal family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — The Blackflame Empire contains descendants of House Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Blackflame Empire is the faction/location of Eithan Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin Arelius is a representative of the Blackflame Empire.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The Blackflame Empire is a target of interest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — Eithan spent much of his life in the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — The Blackflame Empire is an entity that Eithan seeks to prevent from invading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — The Blackflame Empire is a territory that would be destroyed by the Dreadgods' invasion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackflame Empire is a faction or empire mentioned in relation to Eithan's clothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackflame Empire contains sacred artists who have been transported to the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Blackflame Empire is a factor in Yerin's training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Blackflame Empire is an entity that people are training to stop an invasion from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackflame Empire needs to be evacuated before the danger of the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackflame Empire was targeted by Redmoon Emissaries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — The Blackflame Empire has Arelius family workers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — The group will emerge in the western Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Blackflame Empire humiliated Kiro before killing him.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — The Blackflame Empire provides protection to people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — The Blackflame Empire is a location containing the western region where Orthos is located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Bleeding Phoenix was witnessed in the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — There is no Archlord in the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Blackflame Empire lies beyond the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Blackflame Empire is considered too weak to interest the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The Jai clan was being pushed out of the Blackflame Empire proper.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — The Wastelanders protect the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — A fleet of cloudships arrived from the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — The Blackflame Empire is described as being very large.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — The Blackflame Empire has subordinates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — The Blackflame Empire is a location Jai Long wishes to avoid blending into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Advancing to Underlord is a barrier for virtually every sacred artist in the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Malice has forces arrayed around the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — The Blackflame Empire has clerks and administrators organizing recruitment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — The Blackflame Empire is within Striker range of the Monarchs' fighting.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Blackflame Empire is in Ashwind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Blackflame Empire was once ruled by black dragon emperors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Blackflame Empire has a wall protecting its northern coast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Blackflame Empire was once ruled by the Blackflame family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — A portal back to the Blackflame Empire was expected to open.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Refugees from the Blackflame Empire are mentioned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The battle took place over the western Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — The western Blackflame Empire is a possible starting location for Lindon.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — The Blackflame Empire is in a steady decline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — In the Blackflame Empire, Overlord scales were once considered the highest grade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Blackflame Empire is an empire.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
